rulings.Case Title: SUZANNE MEREDITH VS. 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 13, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC, YAT-HON AU, OREN RUBENSTEIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of contract to allege an express term of the contact that has been breached. Demurer is overruled as to the causes of action for breach of implied covenants as the rental agreement is sufficiently alleged to support causes of action for breach of covenants implied in any rental agreement. Demurer to the UCL cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff, current tenant at the premises sufficiently alleges standing to seek injunction of unlawful practices. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUZANNE MEREDITH VS. 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday November 13, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT 1016 WASHINGTON STREET, LLC, YAT-HON AU, OREN RUBENSTEIN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support request for punitive damages. Motion to strike as to the cause of action for breach of contract is moot in light of the ruling on demurrer. = (501/REQ)
